source_files_note: Add JPG/PNG GitLab screenshots, Word/docx notes, and text notes to this folder when available; append their paths to source_files.
contribution_summary: Exact merge/commit counts were not extracted from screenshots in-repo at generation time. Use the gitlab_report_link and attached GitLab contribution screenshots for quantitative activity; describe trends qualitatively as 'visible GitLab contribution activity' when numbers are not legible.
executive_summary: V2: Venkatesh expanding investment-option and transaction scenarios (CSR/member, exchanges, DCA, allocations) with focus on stable nightly inclusion.
V3/IDP: Dinesh growing UE subsequent-plan coverage, fixing flaky IDP cases, and adding V3-specific transaction coverage where flows differ from V2.
Performance: Preeti advancing IDP forgot username (mostly complete), forgot password, and change password flows; progress linked to authentication/MFA blockers (Abhitosh, Nick).
API/Legacy: Sunil completed transfer and CSR transfer coverage for multiple legacy plans in nightly; current focus on legacy member profile updates (email, phone).

Program: Swapnil driving Unite/Entity pipelines, API/performance CI integration, backlog/requirements, Stage5→CAT smoke, Stage2 suite, QC4 strategy, Empower and env support; Entity V3 sync under investigation.
Risks: Pipeline/Entity V3 sync, IDP flakiness, auth/MFA dependencies for performance, backlog/requirements clarity.
